instruct.cohorts.addLearnersSubtitle: Note: Learners can be in only one cohort. Adding learners to this group overrides any previous group assignment.
instruct.cohorts.addLearnersSuccessMessa: {countLearners} learners have been added to this cohort.
instruct.cohorts.addLearnersWarningMessa: {countLearners} were pre-assigned for this cohort. This learner will automatically be added to the cohort when they enroll in the course.

instruct.cohorts.existingLearner: {learner} learner was already in the cohort.
instruct.cohorts.manualAssignmentDisable: There must be one cohort to which students can automatically be assigned.
instruct.cohorts.manualCohortWarning: Learners are added to this cohort only when you provide their email addresses or usernames on this page.
instruct.cohorts.noCohortsMessage: You can use Cohorts to create smaller communities in your course, or to design different course experiences for different groups of learners.

instruct.cohorts.title: Cohorts
instruct.cohorts.uploadSuccessMessage: Your file {fileName} has been uploaded. Allow a few minutes for processing.
instruct.courseInfo.page.title: Course Info
instruct.courseTeam.page.title: Course Team Management
instruct.courseTeam.roles.adminDescripti: Course team members with the Admin role help you manage your course. They can do all of the tasks that Staff can do, and can also add and remove the Staff and Admin roles, discussion moderation roles, and the beta tester role to manage course team membership. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Admin.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.betaDescriptio: Beta Testers can see course content before other learners. They can make sure that the content works, but have no additional privileges. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Beta Tester.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.ccxCoachDescri: CCX Coaches are able to create their own Custom Courses based on this course, which they can use to provide personalized instruction to their own students based in this course material.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.communityTADes: Community TAs are members of the community who help course teams moderate discussions. They can see posts by learners in their assigned cohort or enrollment track, and can edit or delete posts, clear flags, close or re-open threads, and endorse responses. Their posts are marked as 'Community TA'. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Community TA.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.courseDataRese: Course Data Researchers can access the data download tab. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Course Data Researcher.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.discussionAdmi: Discussion Admins can edit or delete any post, clear misuse flags, close and re-open threads, endorse responses, and see posts from all groups. Their posts are marked as 'staff'. They can also add and remove the discussion moderation roles to manage course team membership. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Discussion Admin.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.discussionMode: Discussion Moderators can edit or delete any post, clear misuse flags, close and re-open threads, endorse responses, and see posts from all groups. Their posts are marked as 'staff'. They cannot manage course team membership by adding or removing discussion moderation roles. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Discussion Moderator.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.groupCommunity: Group Community TAs are members of the community who help course teams moderate discussions. Group Community TAs see only posts by learners in their assigned group. They can edit or delete posts, clear flags, close and re-open threads, and endorse responses, but only for posts by learners in their group. Their posts are marked as 'Community TA'. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Group Community TA.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.limitedStaffDe: Course team members with the Limited Staff role help you manage your course. Limited Staff can enroll and unenroll learners, as well as modify their grades and access all course data. Limited Staff don't have access to your course in Studio. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Limited Staff.
instruct.courseTeam.roles.staffDescripti: Course team members with the Staff role help you manage your course. Staff can enroll and unenroll learners, as well as modify their grades and access all course data. Staff also have access to your course in Studio and Insights. Any users not yet enrolled in the course will be automatically enrolled when added as Staff.
instruct.csvComponent.downloadCSVDescrip: Only properly formatted CSV files will be accepted
instruct.dataDownloads.generateReport.su: Generating {reportType}. To view the status of the report, see Pending Tasks
instruct.dataDownloads.generateReports.d: Once generated, these CSV file reports will be available in the Available Reports section. Generation takes longer for larger courses.
instruct.dataDownloads.page.description: The reports listed below are available for download, identified by UTC date and time of generation.
instruct.dataDownloads.page.reportExpira: To keep student data secure, you cannot save or email these links for direct access. Copies of links expire within 5 minutes. Report files are deleted 90 days after generation. If you will need access to old reports, download and store the files, in accordance with your institution's data security policies.
instruct.dataDownloads.page.title: Available Reports
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.anonymize: Report of enrolled learners with student IDs anonymized.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.enrolledS: Report of all enrolled learners for this course including email address and username.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.grade.des: Course grade report for all enrolled learners.
Report of all ORA assignment details.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.ora2Summa: Report of details and statuses for ORA.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.pendingAc: Report of enrolled learners who have not yet activated their account.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.pendingEn: Report of learners who can enroll in the course but have not done so yet.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.problemGr: Report showing students' grades for all problems in the course.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.problemRe: Report of all student answers to a problem.
Note: You can also select a section or chapter to include results of all problems in that section or chapter.
instruct.dataDownloads.reports.submissio: ZIP file containing all submission texts and attachments.
instruct.dateExtensions.page.addIndividu: To grant an extension, select a student, graded subsection, and define the extension due date and time.
instruct.dateExtensions.page.error.missi: Unable to reset extension: missing user or course ID.
Resetting a problem's due date rescinds a due date extension for a student on a particular subsection. This will revert the due date for the student back to the problem's original due date.
instruct.dateExtensions.page.title: Viewing Granted Extensions
instruct.enrollments.checkEnrollmentStat: Learner’s My Open edX email address or username
instruct.enrollments.page.title: Enrollment Management
instruct.grading.descriptionAllLearners: These grading tools allow for grade review and adjustment all enrolled learners on a specific problem.
instruct.grading.descriptionSingleLearne: These grading tools allow for grade review and adjustment for a specific learner on a specific problem.
instruct.grading.noGradingConfiguration: No grading configuration found for this course.
instruct.pageNotFound.body: The page you're looking for is unavailable or there's an error in the URL. Please check the URL and try again.
instruct.pendingTasks.section.title: Pending Tasks
